Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface BigDecimalValidator

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BigDecimalValidatorImpl
public interface BigDecimalValidator extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>
Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal value.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectValidator) imply ExtensibleObjectValidator.isNotNull().

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BigDecimalPrecisionValidator
    precision()
    Returns a validator for BigDecimal.precision().

    Returns a validator for BigDecimal.scale().

    Verifies nested requirements.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableValidator

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberValidator

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • precision

      BigDecimalPrecisionValidator precision()
      Returns a validator for BigDecimal.precision().
      Returns:
      a validator for BigDecimal.precision()

    • precision

      BigDecimalValidator precision(Consumer<BigDecimalPrecisionValidator> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the BigDecimal.precision()
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null

    • scale

      PrimitiveNumberValidator<Integer> scale()
      Returns a validator for BigDecimal.scale().
      Returns:
      a validator for BigDecimal.scale()

    • scale

      BigDecimalValidator scale(Consumer<PrimitiveNumberValidator<Integer>> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the BigDecimal.scale()
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null
